Name: NOI
nepa_event_description__c: Notice of Intent published in Federal Register Vol. 86 No. 49; 30-day scoping period initiated.

Name: Scoping Open
nepa_event_description__c: Public scoping period opened. FAA held four virtual scoping meetings across Denver metro area reaching approximately 1

Name: Scoping Complete
nepa_event_description__c: Scoping period closed. 623 scoping comments received from individuals, municipalities, airlines, and advocacy groups. Key issues identified: community noise equity, air quality near schools, and impacts to wildlife corridors.

Name: Draft EIS Published
nepa_event_description__c: Draft Environmental Impact Statement published and filed with EPA. Notice of Availability published in Federal Register.

Name: Comment Period Open
nepa_event_description__c: 45-day public comment period on Draft EIS opened. Online portal at regulations.gov and three in-person comment sessions scheduled.

Name: Comment Period Closed
nepa_event_description__c: Public comment period on Draft EIS closed. 847 substantive comments received from 412 individuals and 23 organizations including City of Aurora and Adams County.

Name: Final EIS Published
nepa_event_description__c: Final EIS published incorporating responses to all 847 public comments. Preferred Alternative identified as Alternative B. Notice of Availability filed with EPA; 30-day ROD waiting period initiated.

Name: ROD Issued
nepa_event_description__c: Record of Decision signed by FAA Western Service Center Acting Regional Administrator. Alternative B selected with noise mitigation commitments.

Name: Decision Issued
nepa_event_description__c: Final agency decision recorded. Project implementation authorization complete. Monitoring and mitigation program initiated.
